rules.title: {{component_name}} must have an accessible label
rules.description: Every {{component_name}} instance must have a non-empty accessible name computable by the accessibility tree.
rules.expected: element has accessible name via text content OR aria-label OR aria-labelledby

conditions: element has non-empty trimmed text content
element has aria-labelledby whose target has non-empty text content

rules.message: {{component_name}} has no accessible label. Add visible text or an accessible name attribute.
rules.fix: Add visible text, aria-label, or aria-labelledby to the root element.

rules.title: {{component_name}} visual values must reference design tokens
rules.description: All color, spacing, radius, typography, and motion values applied to {{selector_root}} must reference design tokens.
rules.expected: visual CSS properties use var(--) tokens or allowed literal values
rules.message: Hardcoded value '{value}' found on '{property}'. Replace it with the corresponding design token.
rules.fix: Replace hardcoded visual values with component or global design tokens.

rules.title: {{component_name}} must use logical CSS properties
rules.description: Physical left/right CSS properties break RTL layouts unless intentionally overridden.
rules.expected: uses logical properties such as padding-inline, margin-inline, inset-inline, border-inline
rules.message: Physical RTL-sensitive property '{property}' found. Use a logical CSS property instead.
rules.fix: Replace left/right properties with logical inline equivalents.
